title: 10.06.2026 — Nika, Day 6
paragraphs: The morning began with a trip to the restaurant to retrieve my passport. On the way back to the boat, we divided our duties: Krzysztof would take the overland route in a rental car belonging to Anton, the boat's owner, while Anton and I would make our way to Gdynia by water. I had about two more hours of sailing ahead of me!!!

We hoisted the sail in the very first minutes and fell into conversation. I was sharing some of my dreams—about sailing around the world and my desire to hone my skills so I could earn a living without ever stepping off the boat, moored in any marina. Anton told me straight: 'Later will never come! Buy a boat and hone your skills right there on board. Believing that someday, when everything settles down, you'll be ready—that's just a swamp. I've seen plenty of people like that.'
I am deeply grateful to Anton for that speech! That was exactly the Word that was in the beginning!
